positive: A vibrant, minimalist stylized depiction of a majestic golden retriever running through a lush field of wildflowers at sunrise. The scene should be composed with strong, clean silhouettes against a gradient sky of warm oranges, soft lavenders, and bright yellows. Use a clean, graphic vector art style with thick outlines and limited, complementary color palette. Focus on dynamic movement and a central, powerful composition. The print should be perfect for fabric printing, emphasizing crisp lines and solid color blocks. Highly detailed, clean lines, posterized effect, ambient occlusion.
